properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v3 v2 v3 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My Father I adore You more Than anything my heart could wish for I just want You And Jesus my beloved savior Everything I am I owe to You I owe it all to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And angels come and adore You And we your children worship You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are my world You are my God And I lay down my life for You You are my Lord The one I love No one could ever take Your place

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And everything I have I give to You My Lord, the One I live for I live for You And all my days are gifts from You I pray I'd use them as You want me to Use them for You
